overview: GLM-5.1 is a large language model from Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM), part of the GLM (flagship) line. Released 2026-04-07. Z.ai's frontier flagship large language model line, built for reasoning, agentic workflows and long-horizon coding, with open weights.
What's notable in this version: 744B MoE (40B active), 200K context / up to 128K output; tuned for sustained autonomous execution (up to ~8 hours on one task) and engineering delivery.
